Name: Scorching Sun
Effect: On Enter: If you have more than 2 Suns in play, banish all beings with 1 or less Power at this location.

Name: Golden Crow
Effect: On Enter: If you have more than 3 Suns in play, banish a being with 2 or less Power at this location.

Name: Red Sun
Effect: On Enter: If you have more than 4 Suns in play, banish all beings with 3 or less power at this location. Ongoing: Beings here gain +1 Power.

Name: Dawn Sun
Effect: On Enter: Draw a card if there are 2 or fewer Suns on the board. Ongoing: Beings here cannot be banished by Suns.

Name: Eclipse Sun
Effect: On Enter: Banish a Sun at any location. If you do, draw a card.

Name: Zenith Sun
Effect: On Enter: If there are 4+ Suns, banish a being with 3 or less Power here.

Name: Twilight Sun
Effect: On Enter: Move a Sun from an adjacent location to this location. If there are 3+ Suns here, banish a being with 2 or less Power at this location.

Name: Storm Sun
Effect: On Enter: If there are 4+ Suns on the board, banish all beings with 1 Power at any location. Ongoing: Suns here cannot be moved by opponents.

Name: Solstice Sun
Effect: On Enter: If you have more than 4 Suns at this location. Banish all non-Sun beings here.

Name: Sun Charioteer
Effect: On Enter: Move up to 2 Suns from one location to another.

Name: Di Jun, Father of the Suns
Effect: On Enter: Put up to 2 Suns from your deck into play at any location. If you control 5+ Suns, banish Di Jun and all Suns at this location.

Name: Xihe, Mother of the Suns
Effect: On Enter: Put up to 2 Suns from your deck into play at any location. If you control 5+ Suns, banish Di Jun and all Suns at this location.

Name: Chang'e, the Moon Goddess
Effect: On Enter: Banish up to 2 Suns at any location. If you do, draw a card for each Sun banished this way.

Name: Houyi, the Divine Archer
Effect: On Enter: Banish up to 2 Suns at any location. If you have a single sun in play.
